rationale: Test failure on Mono due to anonymous type name differences; CI/platform compatibility issue, no spec involvement.
ConcurrentModificationException in VerifyState when replica set members change; internal implementation bug, not a spec violation.
NullReferenceException in LINQ FirstOrDefault with empty string comparison; C#-specific LINQ implementation bug.
LINQ modulus operator supports only int32 but server accepts int64; LINQ translation bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Wrong serializer registered for MongoDBRef/SystemProfilingInfo due to static constructor ordering; internal initialization bug.
SafeMode getLastError sent to admin db fails with auth in server 2.1+; driver compatibility issue, no named spec rule violated.
ReadOnlyCollection<> mapping improvement for BSON serializer; API ergonomics, not a spec conformance issue.
Improve error message for unsupported Distinct in LINQ; UX/ergonomics improvement, no spec involvement.
Wrong error message when Distinct followed by Count in LINQ; internal LINQ error-handling bug, no spec violation.
LINQ AsQueryable fails when T is an interface type; C#-specific serializer lookup bug, no spec rule violated.
insufficient detail
BsonSerializationException when using typed update builder with subclass; internal serialization bug in C# type system, not spec.
Connection fails first time when replica set config uses hostnames but client uses IPs; no specific SDAM spec rule named.
Make BsonClassMapSerializer public again for custom serializer use; API visibility change, no spec involvement.
Unit test failure reading profiling info against server 2.1.2 due to BsonReader state; test compatibility issue.
Nullable comparisons don't work in VB.NET LINQ; VB.NET-specific language binding bug, no spec involvement.
OfType() followed by Count() in LINQ throws InvalidCastException; C#-specific LINQ translation bug.
$csharpnull representation crashes server replication; C#-specific BSON encoding with no BSON spec rule on this encoding.
GridFS upload fails due to missing index; operational/server-side issue, no GridFS spec conformance question.
Dictionary partial update causes serialization/deserialization errors; C#-specific serializer issue not contradicting a BSON spec rule.
Connection string with multiple hosts fails to connect to replica set; user-reported support question, no specific spec rule named.
Serialization NullReferenceException when interface property value is null; C#-specific serializer bug, not a BSON spec violation.
API improvements to BsonDateTime class (enforce UTC, remove helpers); API ergonomics change, no spec conformance question.
Commands from collection helpers ignore collection ReadPreference and use database ReadPreference instead; violates server selection/read preference spec.
SafeMode/WriteConcern URL builder doesn't support w:majority; feature addition, not a spec conformance bug.
BsonTypeMapper.TryMapToBsonValue fails on QueryDocument subclass; internal type dispatch bug, no spec rule violated.
User confused about GUID byte ordering when querying; support question, no spec conformance issue identified.
Driver sends $readPreference to mongos 2.2 shard, gets 'unrecognized command'; driver/server version compatibility issue.
LINQ Sum operator throws NotSupportedException; missing LINQ feature, no spec involvement.
Request to allow overwriting registered BSON serializers; API ergonomics improvement, no spec conformance issue.
insufficient detail
Typed update builder breaks with variable index into list; C#-specific expression tree compilation bug, no spec involvement.
LINQ translates !bool to {$ne:true} instead of {false}; performance/optimization issue in LINQ translation, no spec rule.
Polymorphic array deserialization fails; C#-specific BSON deserialization bug with no named BSON spec rule violated.
Refactor QueryConditionList and QueryNotConditionList to share abstract base; API design/refactoring, no spec involvement.
MSI installer blocks side-by-side installation of driver versions; packaging/installer bug, no spec involvement.
SecondaryPreferred always picks primary due to latency window timing in Connect(); implementation timing issue, no specific server selection rule named.
Unrecognized $query command error on mongos 2.0.7; version compatibility issue between old server and newer driver.
Explicitly standardizing on WriteConcern 'across all drivers'; renaming SafeMode to WriteConcern for cross-driver consistency.
LINQ 'is' predicate generates wrong query missing member name prefix; C#-specific LINQ translation bug.
FormatException message uses formatter string without calling String.Format; minor error message bug, no spec involvement.
Standardizing default WriteConcern to acknowledge writes 'across all drivers'; explicit cross-driver behavioral alignment effort.
Add API to enumerate all registered BSON class maps; API addition, no spec involvement.
Add ToLowerInvariant/ToUpperInvariant support in LINQ queries; LINQ feature addition, no spec involvement.
Disconnected server throws InvalidOperationException instead of MongoConnectionException; exception type design issue, no spec rule.
Third-party MongoRepository implementation causes unintended collection writes; user support question, not a driver spec issue.
Rename BsonDocument Add methods to AddRange and clean up overloads; API refactoring, no spec involvement.
Add indexing operator to BsonValue for ergonomic document traversal; API convenience improvement, no spec involvement.
Replace switch statements with virtual dispatch in BsonValue ToXyz methods; internal refactoring, no spec involvement.
Simplify BsonReader/BsonWriter method signatures to return objects instead of out params; API refactoring, no spec conformance issue.
